title: Enqueue discovered candidates to staging research queue
problem: ticket-140 ranks discovered OpenAlex candidates in discover-sources JSON only. Operators cannot persist ranked candidates to candidate_sources and research_queue staging tables for operator review before fetch or ingest.
acceptance_criteria: discover-sources --rank-only --enqueue --db <path> --question <rq_id> persists ranked candidates to candidate_sources and research_queue (staging only).
Idempotent re-run per research_question_id and provider_id (no duplicate queue rows).
No writes to accepted sources or claims tables; no automatic ingest.
Mocked unit tests only in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
non_goals: Automatic credibility final decisions without operator review.
rollback_plan: Remove --enqueue path; retain ticket-140 rank-only JSON output.
